name: ArcBuds Pro
description: Premium wireless earbuds with ANC, IPX5 water resistance, 30hr battery, gym-ready fit.

name: ArcBuds Lite
description: Lightweight wireless earbuds, 20hr battery, basic noise isolation.

name: ArcBuds Sport
description: Sport-focused earbuds with ear hooks, IPX7, heart rate integration via companion app.

name: ArcCase Pro
description: Slim clip-on carry case for ArcBuds Pro, gym-proof hard shell, carabiner loop.

name: ArcCase Lite
description: Soft pouch carry case, fits all ArcBuds models, travel-friendly.

name: ArcCase Vault
description: Waterproof hard-shell case with built-in charging cable organiser.

name: Sports Armband X
description: Stretch-fit phone armband for workouts, fits phones up to 6.9 inches.

name: Gym Grip Gloves
description: Touchscreen-compatible gym gloves with wrist support.

name: Hydration Smartbottle
description: BLE-enabled smart water bottle tracking hydration via app.

name: ArcDock 3-in-1
description: Wireless charging dock for phone, earbuds, and smartwatch simultaneously.

name: ArcDock Slim
description: Single-device wireless charging pad, 15W fast charge.

name: ArcBand Pro
description: Smart fitness band with SpO2, sleep tracking, GPS, and 7-day battery.

name: ArcWatch SE
description: Stylish smartwatch with AMOLED display, health suite, and call support.

name: ArcLight Desk Lamp
description: Smart LED desk lamp with touch control, adjustable colour temperature, USB-C charging port.

name: ArcClip Webcam
description: 1080p clip-on webcam for home offices, noise-cancelling dual mic.
